title: Create: Essential recipes
description: This mod adds essential recipes to create mod. Say hello to renewable zinc &  copper!
body:
**IMPORTANT!:** You do **not** need [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) to use this mod/datapack!

# About:
This mod/datapack adds some recipes that i think are essential for create. (_I personally recommend adding it to oneblock, but you can also use this in normal worlds_)
Feel free to add/remove/customize the recipes (only possible in datapack version)

# CONTENT:

Here are top 3 recipes that are included in the datapack/mod and I think that you will use these the most. (all recipes are avaiable in the gallery section)

1.  Zinc - If you wash limestone under a fan, you have 10% chance of getting a crushed raw zinc, which also solves a problem with getting it. Now you can build an automatic farm and do not have to go mining every time you need some.
   
2. Diamond - By compacting 9 blocks of coal, you will now  have a small chance to get a Diamond!

3. Coal - When you compact 4 charcoal you will get one coal, so you can make automatic diamond farms, and save yourself the hassle of mining.

# Suggestions:
If you want to add, remove or improve something, feel free to suggest your idea using **Report issues**. Thanks!

# Issues:
If you have any problems or issues please let me know in the **Report issues** link.
